upgrade_history.change_note: Initial suite registration against ProductOS Core 0.1.0.
Adopted ProductOS Core 0.2.0 for launch readiness and mastery operating coverage.
Adopted ProductOS V2.0 as the stable end-to-end operating baseline.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V4.1.0 after passing governed communication, market-intelligence, and Ralph-loop validation.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V4.2.0 after the live-doc and messaging slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V4.3.0 after the next-version discover and control-surface slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V4.4.0 after the next-version alignment, weekly operator, and improvement slices passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V4.5.0 after the adapter parity and unattended market-refresh hardening slices passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V4.6.0 after the governed market-intelligence distribution completion slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V4.7.0 after the readable-doc and real-workspace completion slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V5.0.0 after the lifecycle-traceability through prd_handoff slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V6.0.0 after the lifecycle-traceability through release_readiness slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V7.0.0 after the lifecycle-traceability through outcome review slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V7.1.0 after the PM superpower core slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V7.2.0 after the mission-first PM workflow slice passed automatic Ralph-gated release promotion.
Promoted the suite to ProductOS V7.3.0 after the public release operator slice passed the public release operator.
